title: Ultra Optimized
description: Ultra Optimized is a high-FPS modpack that makes Minecraft way smoother and faster! Less lag, more frames, better gameplay—everywhere you play!
body:
# Ultra Optimized

**Ultra Optimized** is a performance-focused modpack designed to give your Minecraft a serious FPS boost. Whether you're in singleplayer or joining a multiplayer server, this modpack helps make your game run smoother, cleaner, and faster.

## Key Features

- 🚀 **Boosted FPS** – Carefully selected optimization mods to reduce lag and increase frame rates
- 🎮 **Compatible Everywhere** – Works with any server or singleplayer world
- 🧩 **Lightweight Resource Packs** – Designed to ease performance load
- 🔧 **No Extra Bloat** – Just performance improvements, nothing unnecessary

## Compatibility

This modpack can be used on any world or server. To keep the performance gains, avoid adding heavy mods. We recommend to use the pack as provided, as we can only guarantee functionality in an unmodified environment.

## Partnerships

**🤝 SafiNetwork** – A good free2play Minecraft Network! [Join here](https://discord.gg/BEYRpMnpBf)

## Need Help?

Official Discord links are in the "Links" box, somewhere around this description.
